channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: A hamstring injury silenced George Pickens. His Steelers teammates picked up the slack vs. Browns
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — A hamstring injury managed to do the one thing to George Pickens that nobody else has during the Pittsburgh Steelers wide receiver's three eventful years in the NFL, Pickens included. It kept him quiet. Temporarily anyway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mets roasted by 'SNL' cast in hilarious Juan Soto free agency skit
item.description: As Juan Soto's free agency continues, the "Saturday Night Live" crew had a little fun with what's been going on while tossing a dig at the New York Mets
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Darnold delivers for Vikings with career-high 347 yards and 5 TDs to beat Falcons, Cousins 42-21
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Sam Darnold tossed aside his stoic demeanor for a moment after realizing he was on the videoboard, aggressively twirling a towel to further stoke the crowd's fire after the Minnesota Vikings had pulled away from Kirk Cousins and the Atlanta Falcons late in the game.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Tua Tagovailoa wouldn't want to repeat everything that was said in the Miami Dolphins' huddle Sunday when they trailed the New York Jets in the fourth quarter.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cal selected to play in LA Bowl later this month; UNLV’s coach hired away
item.description: The last time the Bears made consecutive bowl appearances was 2018 and 2019 in Wilcox's second and third seasons in Berkeley.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: College Football Playoff's first 12-team bracket is set with Oregon No. 1 and SMU in, Alabama out
item.description: The new, 12-team College Football Playoff brings with it a promise to be bigger, more exciting, more lucrative. Perfect or 100% fair? Well, nobody ever believed that.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Big Ten wins playoff selection derby, followed by SEC despite notable Alabama omission
item.description: College football's conference shakeup left concerns about two super conferences dominating the playoff field. They weren't totally unfounded or 100% borne out. The Big Ten, not the Southeastern Conference, was the biggest winner Sunday. The ACC scored, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alabama left out of playoff as committee rewards SMU's wins over Crimson Tide's strong schedule
item.description: The College Football Playoff committee took SMU's wins over Alabama's strength of schedule, picking the Mustangs for the final at-large spot Sunday after a furious public debate and days of lobbying and arguing over which teams should make the 12-team field.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cataldi promises hospitalized teammate Bove a goal and delivers as Fiorentina wins 8th straight
item.description: ROME (AP) — Danilo Cataldi texted hospitalized Fiorentina teammate Edoardo Bove to say that he would score for him Sunday and then fulfilled his promise in a 1-0 win over Cagliari on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saints QB Derek Carr injures left hand on dive in 4th quarter of win over Giants
item.description: New Orleans Saints quarterback Derek Carr injured his left hand late in the fourth quarter of Sunday’s 14-11 victory over the New York Giants when he went airborne while trying for a first down and crashed to the turf.
item.dc:creator: Tom Canavan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Saints coach Darren Rizzi unleashes wrath on punter after play vs Giants
item.description: New Orleans Saints interim head coach Darren Rizzi was seen tearing into punter Matthew Hayball during the team's game against the New York Giants on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nick Saban questions strength of schedule factor in CFP as Alabama misses field
item.description: Former Alabama Crimson Tide head coach Nick Saban wondered if strength of schedule was really a factor when it came to the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lando Norris wins season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix to seal constructors' title for McLaren
item.description: ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Lando Norris ended McLaren's 26-year wait for the Formula 1 constructors' title as he won the season-ending Abu Dhabi Grand Prix on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why did the SF Giants add Willy Adames? A deep dive into the numbers
item.description: Adames has never been an All-Star, Gold Glover or Silver Slugger, but the 29-year-old has long been one of the best shortstops in baseball
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Legendary NFL coach Tony Dungy talks cursing at players in locker room
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Famer Tony Dungy weighed in on NFL executive Andrew Brandt's take about coaches using foul language in the locker room during victory speeches.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oregon, Penn State amass 55 points to set Big Ten title game 1st-half scoring record
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Oregon and Penn State piled up seven touchdowns, 537 yards, 28 first downs and 55 points in the Big Ten title game Saturday night. That was in the first half. The top-ranked Ducks headed into halftime with a 31-24 lead.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas native Amber Glenn wins biggest US women's figure skating title in 14 years, beating Japan's stars
item.description: Amber Glenn won the first women's singles final gold medal at the figure skating Grand Prix for the U.S. since 2010, and she could make her first Olympics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: George Pickens fined over $20,000 after criticisms about behavior from head coach: report
item.description: Just days after Mike Tomlin said George Pickens needs to "grow up," the star receiver was reportedly hit with over $20,000 in fines from unsportsmanlike conduct penalties.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Haliburton scores 23 points as the Pacers beat the Bulls 132-123
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Tyrese Haliburton had 23 points and eight assists, and the Indiana Pacers stopped a four-game slide with a 132-123 victory over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night. Pascal Siakam scored 21 points for Indiana, and Bennedict Mathurin finished with 19.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: MLS Cup championship sold out as Los Angeles Galaxy shoot for 6th title
item.description: It will be a packed crowd Saturday when the Los Angeles Galaxy attempt to capture their league-record sixth MLS Cup. The Galaxy will face off with the New York Red Bulls at Dignity Health Sports Park at 1 p.m., and team officials said tickets have sold out.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Indiana plays Chicago on 8-game road slide
item.description: Indiana Pacers (9-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-13, eighth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Pacers -3; over/under is 247 BOTTOM LINE: Indiana travels to Chicago looking to break its eight-game road losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Montrose Red Hawks receives send off before title game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Montrose High School’s Red Hawks are on the brink of history, entering the state championship game with a perfect record. For a team that hasn’t claimed a title in more than 70 years, the stakes couldn’t be higher.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State expected to hire Bronco Mendenhall
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Bronco Mendenhall is coming back to Utah. Utah State is expected to announce the former BYU head coach as its new head football coach as soon as Friday. ESPN reporter Pete Thamel was the first to break the news.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hagel scores 2, Point has 4 assists in Lightning's 8-1 win over Sharks
item.description: Brayden Point had four assists and Brandon Hagel scored twice to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to an 8-1 victory against the San Jose Sharks. Jake Guentzel, Conor Geekie and Cam Atkinson each scored a goal and assist. Anthony Cirelli, Nick Perbix and Nicholas Paul scored the Lightning’s other goals.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chicago Blackhawks fire Luke Richardson, IceHogs' Sorensen named interim head coach
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Blackhawks General Manager Kyle Davidson announced Thursday the team has fired head coach Luke Richardson. Rockford IceHogs head coach Anders Sorensen has been named interim head coach and will assume duties immediately.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks' losing streak reaches 4 games after 4-2 loss to Bruins
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Brad Marchand and Morgan Geekie each scored two goals, and the Boston Bruins beat the struggling Chicago Blackhawks, 4-2 , on Wednesday night. Boston posted its third consecutive win — all in the past four days. It rallied for a 3-2 overtime victory against Detroit on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies win MWC opener over Wyoming, 70-67
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The undefeated streak is still going for the Aggies. Ian Martinez scored 17 of his 23 points in the second half to help Utah State defeat Wyoming 70-67 on Wednesday night at The Spectrum. Mason Falslev's layup with 35 seconds left stretched Utah State's lead to 70-64.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes bring in 21 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU inks 18 players on National Signing Day
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU football head coach Kalani Sitake announced 18 high school signees to the 2025 recruiting class on Wednesday’s first day of the December early signing period.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State announces 2025 signing class
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State interim head football coach Nate Dreiling announced portions of USU’s signing class on Wednesday, as part of the NCAA Early Signing Day. The class, which includes 20 total players, is comprised of 17 high school athletes and three junior college transfers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Flames honor Johnny Gaudreau, welcome his family back to Calgary in emotional pre-game tribute
item.description: The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz commit 29 turnovers in 133-106 loss to OKC
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz lead the NBA in turnovers, and Tuesday night was their worst night yet. Utah committed a season-high 29 turnovers, 19 in the first half, as the Jazz go 0-4 in NBA Cup games with a 133-106 blowout loss at Oklahoma City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cougars go cold in 83-64 loss at Providence
item.description: PROVIDENCE, R.I. (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team suffered its worst shooting performance of the season and lost at Providence Tuesday night, 83-64 to fall to 6-2 on the season. The Cougars shot just 33.3 percent from the field in scoring a season-low 64 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah HC falls at home to Dallas, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Casey DeSmith made 34 saves for the Dallas Stars, who held on to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Monday. It was DeSmith's first win since Oct. 24.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Sky, Angel Reese to open 2025 season against Indiana Fever, Caitlin Clark
item.description: Angel Reese and Caitlin Clark won't have to wait long to renew their rivalry during the next WNBA season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
